cards.back: Regulated the processing, storage, and disposal of e-waste by setting norms for manufacturers, importers, and exporters
A policy approach where manufacturers take responsibility for the waste generated by their products, promoting a closed loop system

cards.front: E-Waste Management Rules 2022 - Criteria for Designating E-Waste Collection Points
cards.back: Established criteria for designated e-waste collection points, including the type of e-waste they can accept and the facilities they must have to ensure safe collection and transport
Aims to reduce e-waste generation, increase e-waste recycling, and promote the development of a circular economy, with specific targets and timelines

cards.front: E-Waste Management Rules 2022 - Penalties for Non-Compliance
cards.back: Imposed penalties on manufacturers, importers, and exporters for non-compliance with e-waste management regulations, including fines and suspension of licenses
